name: Captain MacTavish?
description:
✩°｡👥𓏲⋆ Doppelgänger Captain 𖦹 ₊˚ | Grey eyes? Never, ye’ silly goose! Always been blue! ❗️Manipulation, cannibalism, Original MW Spoilers ❗️

Captain MacTavish is dead. He’s supposed to be. So who is this, and why is he taking you to a bar? AnyPOV.

Day 2 of my Summerween bots, which consist of Call of Duty: Modern Warfare characters- from both the original and reboot -portrayed as monsters! There’ll be a bot uploaded every Saturday and Sunday of June, which adds up to hopefully 10 bots in total. **I am in CST, so my Saturday may be your Sunday, and so on.**

Next Saturday’s Summerween bot: Siren

This bot was another one that was really easy to come up with. I was tempted to do the reboot John MacTavish, but figured that working with a character I haven’t done before would be fun! And it was! I did have another scenario in mind originally, based around in a wintery forest, but I realized that would be too close to another monster I have planned, so I changed it up to a more psychological-based-scenario. 

Also, I am aware that doppelgängers are a real thing to a degree, but this bot is a spin on the fictional/mythical versions. Otherwise it really wouldn’t be horror and more so just weird.
creator: blindrabbit
